Possibly I'm misunderstanding how these tests work, but I think I'd expect this to look something like the following: ``` ssrHtml: `

selected: two, three

`, ```

it's over here: 

https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte/blob/b662c7fd41b3b778ea1ae80b0a4d86c239ffcfe7/test/server-side-rendering/index.ts#L207-L211

for server_side_rendering test, it'll check the html content with `ssrHtml || html` if exists.
since the changes now make the `ssrHtml` the same as `html`, i'm removing the `ssrHtml`
